message:
feat(workspace): extract frankenterm-core-error-types leaf crate (ft-g6sa8 / ft-t2d70.1)

Tier-1 leaf crate carved out of frankenterm-core. Holds the WA-XXXX
error code catalog (`error_codes.rs`, 2080 LOC) — pure type definitions
+ a LazyLock<HashMap> lookup table, zero `crate::*` deps.

Mechanics:
- Created crates/frankenterm-core-error-types/ (only dep: serde with
  derive+std+alloc features for Cow<str> Serialize/Deserialize).
- git mv'd error_codes.rs from frankenterm-core/src/ into the new crate.
- Added the new crate as workspace member + path-dep on frankenterm-core.
- Re-exported via `pub use frankenterm_core_error_types::error_codes;`
  in frankenterm-core/src/lib.rs so `crate::error_codes::*` and
  `frankenterm_core::error_codes::*` paths keep resolving unchanged.
  All 8 in-tree call sites (output/error_renderer.rs, robot_types.rs,
  6 test files) compile transparently.

Build verification (CC=llvm-clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-cc6-target):
- cargo check -p frankenterm-core-error-types: 0.80s clean
- cargo check -p frankenterm-core: zero error_codes-related errors
  (16 pre-existing replay_* errors are baseline damage from another
  agent's WIP frankenterm-core-replay extraction in commit b7c9f64a —
  not introduced by this change).

Note on parent ADR estimate: the ft-t2d70 proposal called for a "~117
LOC error-types extraction" — that was a misread from error.rs:117
(`pub type Result<T>`). The actual leaf-clean module turned out to be
error_codes.rs (2080 LOC of pure data + lookup logic) rather than
error.rs (1486 LOC entangled with network_reliability). Closes
ft-g6sa8 with the same crate name; ft-otfxs (config-types) and ft-0pykm
(policy-types) still need their own discovery passes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,15 @@
+[package]
+name = "frankenterm-core-error-types"
+description = "Error code catalog (WA-XXXX) leaf crate extracted from frankenterm-core (ft-g6sa8 / ft-t2d70.1)"
+version.workspace = true
+edition.workspace = true
+rust-version.workspace = true
+authors.workspace = true
+license-file.workspace = true
+repository.workspace = true
+
+[lints]
+workspace = true
+
+[dependencies]
+serde = { workspace = true, features = ["derive", "std", "alloc"] }

@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+//! `frankenterm-core-error-types` — error code catalog leaf crate (ft-g6sa8 / ft-t2d70.1).
+//!
+//! Tier-1 leaf crate carved out from `frankenterm-core`. Holds the WA-XXXX
+//! error code catalog (`error_codes` module) — pure type definitions +
+//! lookup tables, no first-party deps.
+//!
+//! Re-exported from `frankenterm-core` as `frankenterm_core::error_codes::*`
+//! so existing call sites resolve unchanged.
+
+pub mod error_codes;

@@ -25,6 +25,7 @@ tracing-subscriber.workspace = true
 futures.workspace = true
 frankenterm-alloc.workspace = true
 frankenterm-core-resource-types = { path = "../frankenterm-core-resource-types" }
+frankenterm-core-error-types = { path = "../frankenterm-core-error-types" }
 
 # Pattern matching
 aho-corasick.workspace = true
